title: dactyloctenium pilosum
intro: Dactyloctenium pilosum, also known as silver cockspur grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being used to treat fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dactyloctenium pilosum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or topical paste, making it a versatile herb for various herbal preparations.
